PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\girls-stem-dashboard"; npx vercel deploy --prod 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Production|Aliased|Error|ready' } | Select-Object -Last 5)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['scripts','devDependencies','dependencies'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(sed -i 's/return ok\(\(learner as any\).learner_profiles\)/return ok\(\(learner as unknown as { learner_profiles: unknown }\).learner_profiles\)/' "app/api/v1/student/profile/route.ts")

Bash(sed -i 's/.eq\('\\''learner_id'\\'', \(learner as any\).learner_id\)/.eq\('\\''learner_id'\\'', \(learner as unknown as { learner_id: string }\).learner_id\)/' "app/api/v1/student/profile/route.ts")
Bash(sed -i 's/.map\(\(e: any\) => e.learners?.user_id\)/.map\(\(e: { learners: { user_id: string } | null }\) => e.learners?.user_id\)/' "app/api/v1/notifications/send/route.ts")
Bash(sed -i 's/\(users || \\[\\]\).map\(\(u: any\) => u.user_id\)/\(users || []\).map\(\(u: { user_id: string }\) => u.user_id\)/' "app/api/v1/notifications/send/route.ts")

Bash(sed -i 's/\(l.program_enrollments || \\[\\]\).map\(\(e: any\) => e.programs?.program_name\).filter\(Boolean\)/\(l.program_enrollments || []\).map\(\(e: { programs: { program_name: string } | null }\) => e.programs?.program_name\).filter\(\(n\): n is string => !!n\)/' "app/api/v1/learners/route.ts")

Bash(sed -i 's/const set = \(k: string, v: any\)/const set = \(k: string, v: unknown\)/' 'app/\(student\)/student/profile/ProfileEditor.tsx' 'app/\(teacher\)/teacher/meetings/TeacherMeetingsClient.tsx')
Bash(sed -i 's/\(m.users as any\)?.full_name/m.users?.full_name/g; s/\(m.users as any\).full_name/m.users?.full_name/g' "app/\(student\)/student/meetings/MeetingsClient.tsx")
Bash(sed -i "s/\(status as any\)\\.pulse/\( status as { pulse?: boolean } \).pulse/" "app/\(teacher\)/teacher/meetings/TeacherMeetingsClient.tsx")

Bash(sed -i 's/.filter\(\(e: any\) => e.status === .active.\)/.filter\(\(e: { status: string; program_id: string }\) => e.status === '\\''active'\\''\)/' "app/\(dashboard\)/learners/[id]/edit/EditLearnerForm.tsx")
Bash(sed -i 's/const ins: any = /const ins: Record<string, unknown> = /' "app/api/v1/sponsors/route.ts")
Bash(sed -i 's/\(learner as any\).learner_id/\(learner as { learner_id: string }\).learner_id/' "app/api/v1/meetings/rate/route.ts")

Bash(sed -i 's/const learner = \(e as any\).learners/const learner = \(e as unknown as { learners: { learner_id: string; user_id: string; learner_profiles: { first_name: string; last_name: string } | null } | null }\).learners/' "app/api/v1/meetings/route.ts")

Bash(sed -i "s/\\[\\['marked','completed'\\]\\].includes\(\(p as any\).stage || \(p as any\).completion_status || ''\)/['marked','completed'].includes\(\(p as { stage: string | null; completion_status: string }\).stage || \(p as { stage: string | null; completion_status: string }\).completion_status || ''\)/" "app/\(dashboard\)/dashboard/page.tsx")

Bash(sed -i 's/.map\(\(s: any\) => \({ school_id: s.school_id, school_name: s.school_name }\)\)/.map\(\(s: { school_id: string; school_name: string }\) => \({ school_id: s.school_id, school_name: s.school_name }\)\)/' "app/\(auth\)/register/page.tsx")

Bash(sed -i 's/\(users || \\[\\]\).map\(\(u: any\) => \({/\(users || []\).map\(\(u: { user_id: string; email: string; full_name: string; role: string; is_active: boolean; created_at: string; last_login: string | null; schools: { school_name: string } | null }\) => \({/' "app/\(dashboard\)/admin/users/page.tsx")
Bash(sed -i 's/const p = \(data as any\).learner_profiles/const p = \(data as unknown as { learner_profiles: Record<string, unknown> }\).learner_profiles/' "app/api/v1/auth/lookup-learner/route.ts")

Bash(sed -i 's/supabase: null as any/supabase: null as unknown as ReturnType<typeof import\('\\''@\\/lib\\/supabase\\/server'\\''\)['\\''createClient'\\'']> extends Promise<infer T> ? T : never/' "app/api/helpers.ts")

Bash(sed -i "s/style={{ '--tw-divide-color': DS.borderLight } as any}/style={{ '--tw-divide-color': DS.borderLight } as React.CSSProperties}/" "app/\(dashboard\)/interventions/InterventionsClient.tsx")
